title: The Law of Skypiea Turns Against Them
description: The White Berets and God’s forces treat the Straw Hats as criminals, forcing the crew to choose escape over obedience.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Luffy, Conis, McKinley, Nami, Sanji. The White Berets and God’s forces treat the Straw Hats as criminals, forcing the crew to choose escape over obedience.

dialogue.speaker: McKinley
dialogue.text: It would have been only 700,000 bell.

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Hey... Foget it. Just ignore them.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Shut up! I'm gonna kick your ass!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: However, you are in big trouble....!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: What!! Why? Didn't you already attack them!?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Besides, that was just an accident!!

summary: The White Berets and God’s forces treat the Straw Hats as criminals, forcing the crew to choose escape over obedience.
